esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
// Request errors (malformed, timed out) — frontend-level counter
| WHERE haproxy.requests.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS err_increase = SUM(INCREASE(haproxy.requests.errors))
  BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.addr
| WHERE err_increase > 10
| EVAL alert_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(haproxy.proxy_name), "::", COALESCE(TO_STRING(haproxy.addr), ""))
| SORT err_increase DESC
| LIMIT 50
